zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Glover Stephens於大約1588年出生在英國素瑞尤厄爾時，她的父親Robert Stephens28歲，母親Joanna Avery19歲。她於大約1608年與Jerome Pyce Pease在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1644年在她的家鄉享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Glover
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English glover, gloifer ‘glover; maker or seller of gloves’, a derivative of Old English glōf ‘glove’.

variants.name: Glovier
meanings: English (Worcestershire): variant of   Glover  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Stephens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stevens
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Glover Stephens was born about 1588, in Ewell, Surrey, England, her father, Robert Stephens, was 28 and her mother, Joanna Avery, was 19. She married Jerome Pyce Pease about 1608, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1644, in her hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Glover Stephens est née environ 1588, à Ewell, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Robert Stephens, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joanna Avery, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Jerome Pyce Pease environ 1608, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1644, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Glover Stephens(이)가 대략 1588년 영국 수리 웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Stephens(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Avery(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1608년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Jerome Pyce Pease(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1644년 그녀의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Glover Stephens родилась около 1588 г. в местности ювелл, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Stephens было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Avery, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jerome Pyce Pease около 1608 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1644 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.
